description_long: This is a glass bottle of Chivas Regal 12 Year Old Blended Scotch Whisky, featuring a rounded body with a gently sloping shoulder and a short, cylindrical neck. The front of the bottle displays a large, ornate label in gold, white, and red, with the brand name 'Chivas Regal' prominently centered above a gold crest and the number '12' in a red medallion. The whisky inside is a rich amber color, visible through the transparent glass. The bottle is sealed with a metallic-looking cap, colored in a deep bronze or copper tone, and the neck is adorned with additional branding and decorative striping. The back of the bottle is mostly clear, showing the whisky and the reverse side of the label, with no additional markings or labels visible.
description: A rounded glass bottle of Chivas Regal 12 Year Old whisky with a prominent gold and red label, amber liquid, and a metallic cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate Chivas Regal label, gold crest, and red '12' medallion, with the amber whisky visible inside.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the clear glass and amber whisky, with the label's reverse side faintly visible and no additional markings.
description_view_2: Front view mirrored, again highlighting the detailed label and branding, with the whisky's color and bottle shape clearly seen.
description_view_3: Back angled view showing the bottle's curvature, clear glass, and partial side of the label, with the metallic cap and neck details visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front label is large, ornate, and centrally placed, featuring the words 'CHIVAS REGAL' in bold white uppercase letters on a gold and red background, with a gold crest above and a red medallion with '12' below. Additional text includes 'BLENDED SCOTCH WHISKY' in gold on a red ribbon. The label is bordered with gold filigree and scrollwork. The neck has a smaller label with '1801' in white and decorative striping. All branding is in a classic, serif font with metallic gold and red accents.
attribute_bottle_cap_type: The cap is a short, cylindrical screw cap made of metal, colored in a deep bronze or copper tone, with a smooth finish and no visible knurling or embossing.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: The neck is short and cylindrical, slightly tapering towards the top, with a smooth profile and decorative striping. It is proportionally wide compared to the bottle's body and has no visible embossing.
attribute_distillery_emblem: A gold crest emblem is visible on the front label above the 'CHIVAS REGAL' text, featuring a shield and ornate scrollwork, consistent with the Chivas Regal brand style.
